creator: ripley@office.in-berlin.de
text:
The libraries got installed as /usr/local/lib/libtix4.1.8.0.so
	etc., but some ports (sysutil/cd-write for example) want to
	depend on libtix4180.so.1

Fix: 

Workaround: softlink the libs to what the other ports want.
	Real fix: work over all ports depending on tcl/tk/tix and
	make the dependencies conform to each other.
